description: The CT Cranium DICOM scan is already loaded in InVesalius 3. As a surgical planner preparing for image-guided neurosurgery, place fiducial markers on the Nasion (midline nasal bridge), Right Pre-Auricular point (just in front of right ear tragus), and Left Pre-Auricular point (just in front of left ear tragus). Document the coordinates for each landmark in a text report at /home/ga/Documents/fiducial_report.txt using the format 'LandmarkName: X, Y, Z'. Save the InVesalius project to /home/ga/Documents/neuronavigation_plan.inv3. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
